title: ...und abends in die Scala
writer: Curth Flatow, Answald Krüger, Maria Matray
actors: Caterina Valente, Gerhard Riedmann, Ruth Stephan
plot: The chorus girl Caterina Duval gets the chance of her life when hired as stand-in of a famous star. On the opening night Catarina is singing, dancing and stepping into the hearts of the audience.
